title: Floating Indicator
description: A UI element that floats near or on top of a reference element, often used for highlighting or drawing attention to specific areas.
summary: A floating visual cue that indicates or highlights elements in the UI.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `FloatingIndicator` works.

<FloatingIndicatorDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `FloatingIndicator` component.

<FloatingIndicatorDemosConfigurator />

## API References

### Styles API

| Styles API   | Type                                  | Default     | Annotation                                    |
| ------------ | ------------------------------------- | ----------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?`  | `boolean`                             | `false`     | if `true`, all default styles will be removed |
| className`?` | `string`                              | `undefined` | pass to root component `<div>`                |
| style`?`     | `CSSProperties & Record<string, any>` | `undefined` | pass to root component `<div>`                |
| color`?`     | `CSSProperties["color"]`              | `undefined` | Determines to indicator color                 |

### Props API

| Props API                    | Type                               | Default     | Annotation                                                                                                                                             |
| ---------------------------- | ---------------------------------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| parent                       | `HTMLElement \| null \| undefined` | `undefined` | Parent element with relative position based on which indicator position should be calculated                                                           |
| target`?`                    | `HTMLElement \| null \| undefined` | `undefined` | Target element over which indicator should be displayed                                                                                                |
| transitionDuration`?`        | `number \| string`                 | `150`       | Transition duration in ms                                                                                                                              |
| displayAfterTransitionEnd`?` | `boolean`                          | ``          | Determines whether indicator should be displayed after transition ends, should be set if used inside a container that has `transform: scale(n)` styles |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="floating-indicator" />

\r
function isParent(parentElement: HTMLElement | EventTarget | null, childElement: HTMLElement | null) {\r
  if (!childElement || !parentElement) {\r
    return false;\r
  }\r
  let parent = childElement.parentNode;\r
  while (parent != null) {\r
    if (parent === parentElement) {\r
      return true;\r
    }\r
    parent = parent.parentNode;\r
  }\r
  return false;\r
}\r
function toInt(value?: string) {\r
  return value ? parseInt(value, 10) : 0;\r
}\r
\r
interface UseFloatingIndicatorInput {\r
  target: HTMLElement | null | undefined;\r
  parent: HTMLElement | null | undefined;\r
  ref: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement | null>;\r
  displayAfterTransitionEnd?: boolean;\r
}\r
export function useFloatingIndicator({ target, parent, ref, displayAfterTransitionEnd }: UseFloatingIndicatorInput) {\r
  const transitionTimeout = React.useRef<number>(-1);\r
  const [initialized, setInitialized] = React.useState(false);\r
\r

\r
  const updatePosition = () => {\r
    if (!target || !parent || !ref.current) return;\r

    const parentRect = parent.getBoundingClientRect();\r
    const targetComputedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(target);\r
    const parentComputedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(parent);\r
\r
    const borderTopWidth = toInt(targetComputedStyle.borderTopWidth) + toInt(parentComputedStyle.borderTopWidth);\r
    const borderLeftWidth = toInt(targetComputedStyle.borderLeftWidth) + toInt(parentComputedStyle.borderLeftWidth);\r
\r
    const position = {\r
      top: targetRect.top - parentRect.top - borderTopWidth,\r
      left: targetRect.left - parentRect.left - borderLeftWidth,\r
      width: targetRect.width,\r
      height: targetRect.height\r
    };\r
\r
    ref.current.style.transform = \`translateY(\${position.top}px) translateX(\${position.left}px)\`;\r
    ref.current.style.width = \`\${position.width}px\`;\r
    ref.current.style.height = \`\${position.height}px\`;\r
  };\r
\r
  const updatePositionWithoutAnimation = () => {\r
    window.clearTimeout(transitionTimeout.current);\r
    if (ref.current) {\r
      ref.current.style.transitionDuration = "0ms";\r
    }\r
    updatePosition();\r
    transitionTimeout.current = window.setTimeout(() => {\r
      if (ref.current) {\r
        ref.current.style.transitionDuration = "";\r
      }\r
    }, 30);\r
  };\r
\r
  const targetResizeObserver = React.useRef<ResizeObserver | null>(null);\r
  const parentResizeObserver = React.useRef<ResizeObserver | null>(null);\r
\r
  React.useEffect(() => {\r
    updatePosition();\r

    if (target) {\r
      targetResizeObserver.current = new ResizeObserver(updatePositionWithoutAnimation);\r
      targetResizeObserver.current.observe(target);\r
\r

      return () => {\r
        targetResizeObserver.current?.disconnect();\r

      };\r
    }\r
\r
    return undefined;\r
  }, [parent, target]);\r
\r
  React.useEffect(() => {\r
    if (parent) {\r
      const handleTransitionEnd = (event: TransitionEvent) => {\r
        if (isParent(event.target, parent)) {\r
          updatePositionWithoutAnimation();\r

        }\r
      };\r
\r
      parent.addEventListener("transitionend", handleTransitionEnd);\r
      return () => {\r
        parent.removeEventListener("transitionend", handleTransitionEnd);\r
      };\r
    }\r
\r
    return undefined;\r
  }, [parent]);\r
  useTimeout(\r
    () => {\r
      // Prevents warning about state update without act\r
      if (getEnv() !== "test") {\r
        setInitialized(true);\r
      }\r
    },\r
    20,\r
    { autoInvoke: true }\r
  );\r
  useMutationObserver(\r
    mutations => {\r
      mutations.forEach(mutation => {\r
        if (mutation.type === "attributes" && mutation.attributeName === "dir") {\r
          updatePositionWithoutAnimation();\r
        }\r
      });\r
    },\r
    { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ["dir"] },\r
    () => document.documentElement\r
  );\r
  return { initialized, hidden };\r
}\r
\r
type Options = __FloatingIndicatorProps & { initialized?: boolean; hidden?: boolean; arHide?: ElementProps["aria-hidden"] };\r
function getStyles(options: Options) {\r
  const { unstyled, className, style, color, initialized, transitionDuration, hidden, arHide } = options;\r

    style: ocx(style, {\r
      "--floating-color": color,\r
      "--transition-duration": typeof transitionDuration === "number" ? \`\${transitionDuration}ms\` : transitionDuration\r
    })\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
interface __FloatingIndicatorProps {\r
  unstyled?: boolean;\r
  className?: string;\r
  style?: React.CSSProperties & Record<string, any>;\r
  color?: React.CSSProperties["color"];\r

}\r
type ElementProps = Omit<React.ComponentProps<"div">, keyof __FloatingIndicatorProps>;\r

  target: HTMLElement | null | undefined;\r

  const { unstyled, className, style, parent, target, displayAfterTransitionEnd, hidden: _hidden, "aria-hidden": arHide, transitionDuration = 200, color = "hsl(var(--constructive))", ...props } = _props;\r
  const innerRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\r

  return <div {...{ ref: mergedRef, ...getStyles(stylesApi), ...props }} />;\r
});\r
